message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[0.01, 10000.00, 250.55, 250.45]","[[\"prefix_sum\", 0], [\"prefix_sum\", 3], [\"range_sum\", 1, 2], [\"update\", 0, 0.02], [\"update\", 3, 9999.99], [\"range_sum\", 0, 3], [\"prefix_sum\", 3], [\"range_sum\", 3, 3]]"],"focus":"Precision and boundary checks: very small and very large float values, updates to first and last indices, single-index range query"},{"input_lines":["[1.10, 2.20, 3.30, 4.40, 5.50, 6.60, 7.70, 8.80, 9.90, 10.00]","[[\"range_sum\", 0, 9], [\"prefix_sum\", 4], [\"update\", 5, 0.55], [\"update\", 0, 11.11], [\"range_sum\", 0, 5], [\"range_sum\", 3, 7], [\"update\", 9, 20.00], [\"prefix_sum\", 9], [\"range_sum\", 8, 9], [\"update\", 5, 6.60], [\"prefix_sum\", 5]]"],"focus":"Batch updates and overlapping queries: multiple updates to same index, mid-array modifications, full-range and sub-range queries to verify consistency over sequences of operations"},{"input_lines":["[12.34, 56.78, 90.12]","[]"],"focus":"No operations: empty operations list should return an empty result list and not alter the initial data structure"}]}
